# Standard Shipping

Standard shipping to the taiwan-main-island takes 3–5 business days after dispatch and costs NT$80; orders of NT$1,000 or more ship free. Deliveries to the outlying-islands require an additional 1–3 business days.

[Source: shipping_faq.md#standard-shipping]
